rule: Parse datetime strings with Go standard library time package before applying policy checks
Select a named layout parser; supported values are RFC3339 RFC1123Z and Unix
Parse with time.RFC3339 and require timezone-bearing input
Parse with time.RFC1123Z and require timezone-bearing input
Parse numeric Unix epoch seconds and do not consume a timezone from the input
Permit datetime input containing an explicit timezone or numeric offset
Load the expected IANA timezone with time.LoadLocation such as America/New_York
Use the loaded location when parsing timezone-less datetime input
When input contains a timezone require it to be consistent with the configured location
